registry.notes: Daily equity training dataset for ranking and direction models.
Option-specific labels tied to premium dynamics and underlying alignment.
24/7 crypto spot training dataset with benchmark-relative features.

equity.cutoff_rule: labels use t+5 close, same-day features at market close

option.cutoff_rule: labels use t+3 option mid and underlying move alignment

crypto.cutoff_rule: labels use rolling 24/7 bars with t+3 horizon

alpha_registry.description: Reward positive 20-day drift and penalize persistent decline.
Score alignment of short and medium moving averages.
Detect fresh breakouts and failed breakdowns.
Prefer names ranked high in both cross-section and sector bucket.
Fade excessive distance from rolling VWAP anchor.
Follow moves backed by significant volume expansion.
Buy pullback when medium trend is positive and pullback is quiet.
Track abnormal turnover events for continuation/fade context.
Use breadth to support/discount directional bets.
Reward names matching current style leadership.
Penalize symbols with unstable realized volatility.
